commands.review_summary:
The PR lets installed plugins use manifest-declared agent tool result middleware and trusted tool policy hooks, adds `contracts.trustedToolPolicies`, and updates docs plus focused tests for the new ordering and rejection behavior.

PR surface: Source +8, Tests +153, Docs +21. Total +182 across 14 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the underlying limitation: current main rejects non-bundled middleware and trusted policy registrations before the requested installed-plugin opt-in can work. I did not run tests because this review is read-only, but the source paths and existing tests directly show the behavior.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can fix the missing catalog contract merge and test; maintainer/security approval remains required before merge.
